## Checklist

Please verify the following before requesting a review:
- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines of this project (linted via `ruff`).
- [ ] Added/updated unit and integration tests to cover the modifications.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally (`pytest`).
- [ ] Native library compilation builds successfully (`make` / `cargo build`).
- [ ] The change has been tested on a simulated feed or live sandbox.

## Reviewers
At least one review from a designated CODEOWNER is required to merge this PR.
- [ ] Core Reviewer (e.g., @AshishTalpada)
